component.name: Inline
component.description: Horizontal flex container. Arranges children side-by-side with consistent spacing from the space.inline token scale. Wraps by default when children exceed the container width.

when: Arranging items side-by-side with consistent spacing
Displaying a group of buttons, tags, or chips that may wrap to a second line
Building a toolbar row, breadcrumb trail, or action bar

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Inline for vertical content flow
antiPatterns.reason: Inline is always a row. Vertical stacking belongs to Stack.

antiPatterns.scenario: Disabling wrap (wrap=false) in a context where the container width is variable
antiPatterns.reason: No-wrap content overflows its container when the viewport shrinks, breaking the layout
antiPatterns.alternative: Only use wrap=false when the container has a fixed or known minimum width and overflow is intentional (e.g., a horizontal scroll region)

purpose.default: Row flex container with configurable gap, alignment, justification, and optional wrapping.

states.description: Static layout container — no interactive states.

compositionPatterns.name: form-actions-row
compositionPatterns.description: Primary + secondary button pair at the bottom of a form.

compositionPatterns.name: tag-group
compositionPatterns.description: A wrapping row of label chips or filter tags.

compositionPatterns.name: nav-bar
compositionPatterns.description: Top navigation with logo on the left and actions on the right.
